de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Interface ReplacementMap<S extends SVSubstitute,T>

  • Type Parameters:
    S - the type of the elements to replace.
    T - the type of the replacements.
    All Superinterfaces:
    java.util.Map<S,T>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ReplacementMap.DefaultReplacementMap, ReplacementMap.NoIrrelevantLabelsReplacementMap

    public interface ReplacementMap<S extends SVSubstitute,T>
extends java.util.Map<S,T>
    A map to be used in an OpReplacer. It maps operators that should be replaced to their replacements.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static class  ReplacementMap.DefaultReplacementMap<S extends SVSubstitute,T>
      The replacement map type to use if TermLabelSettings.getUseOriginLabels() is false.
      static class  ReplacementMap.NoIrrelevantLabelsReplacementMap<S extends SVSubstitute,T>
      The replacement map type to use if TermLabelSettings.getUseOriginLabels() is true.

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface java.util.Map

        java.util.Map.Entry<K,V>

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static <S extends SVSubstitute,T>
      ReplacementMap<S,T>      		 create(TermFactory tf, Proof proof)
      Creates a new replacement map.
      static <S extends SVSubstitute,T>
      ReplacementMap<S,T>      		 create(TermFactory tf, Proof proof, java.util.Map<S,T> initialMappings)
      Creates a new replacement map.

      • Methods inherited from interface java.util.Map

        clear, compute, computeIfAbsent, computeIfPresent, containsKey, containsValue, entrySet, equals, forEach, get, getOrDefault, hashCode, isEmpty, keySet, merge, put, putAll, putIfAbsent, remove, remove, replace, replace, replaceAll, size, values

    • Method Detail

      • create

        static <S extends SVSubstitute,T> ReplacementMap<S,T> create(TermFactory tf,
                                                             Proof proof)
        Creates a new replacement map.
        Type Parameters:
        S - the type of the elements to replace.
        T - the type of the replacements.
        Parameters:
        tf - a term factory.
        proof - the currently loaded proof, or null if no proof is loaded.
        Returns:
        a new replacement map.

      • create

        static <S extends SVSubstitute,T> ReplacementMap<S,T> create(TermFactory tf,
                                                             Proof proof,
                                                             java.util.Map<S,T> initialMappings)
        Creates a new replacement map.
        Type Parameters:
        S - the type of the elements to replace.
        T - the type of the replacements.
        Parameters:
        tf - a term factory.
        proof - the currently loaded proof, or null if no proof is loaded.
        initialMappings - a map whose mapping should be added to the new replacement map.
        Returns:
        a new replacement map.
